title: Ran Xuefeng
content:
Ran Xuefeng is the ancestor of the Ran family and a significant figure tied to several major conflicts and power struggles throughout the story.

Ran Xuefeng is a powerful cultivator from planet Ran Yun, which serves as the Ran family's home. He is one of several family ancestors  alongside Sun Xi and Zhao Chuanwen  who collectively wield influence over their respective families and territories.
Category:Characters
Category:Male
Category:Ascendant
